configurePresets.name: wasm-release
configurePresets.description: Optimized Emscripten build of the simulator module. Requires the EMSDK env var (run emsdk_env).

configurePresets.name: wasm-debug
configurePresets.description: Unoptimized Emscripten build with assertions. Requires the EMSDK env var.

configurePresets.name: tests
configurePresets.description: Native Clang build of the unit-test suite. Uses cmake/toolchain-native-clang.cmake (auto-locates Clang via EMSDK and the Windows SDK rc.exe). SIDE EFFECT: configuring this preset repoints git core.hooksPath at .githooks (the pre-commit test gate, ON by default); disable with -DHS_INSTALL_GIT_HOOKS=OFF. See README §11.
